channel.title: Netlist Studio
channel.description: Innovative consumer products, open source hardware, tools for manufacturing, and more.

item.title: Claude + Oscilloscope
item.description: What happens when you combine Claude with an oscilloscope?

item.title: DUT Hub: Automating Hardware Testing with MicroPython
item.description: MicroPython support + a prototype test jig for semi-automatic testing

item.title: DUT Hub: A Prototype Test Jig Controller (V0.1)
item.description: The DUT Hub is a 4-channel, open-source automated test solution designed for small batch manufacturing and rapid hardware verification.
